productDisplayName: Catwalk Women Ballerina Brown Casual Shoe
description: A perfect addition to your casual wardrobe, this ballerina flat from catwalk is ergonomically designed and has a padded footbed to offer exemplary all-day comfort. Team it with jeans and t-shirts. Upper Synthetic leather upper with a heel cup and has a weave pattern on the forefoot with a bow Elasticated on the sides to offer a snug Fit Padded footbed with a fabric lining for all-day comfort Outsole Ergonomically curved TPR outsole grooved on the forefoot and heel with horse-shoe shaped lugs for absolute grip and easy movement on the dance floor Shoe care Wipe surface with a clean and dry cloth Do not use a drier or store in direct sunlight
